title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Melorra

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Melorra
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Category Manager with drive and ambition, Melorra in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Melorra:
Melorra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
